risks.title: Market Validation Risk
risks.description: Are there enough Mexican craft beer enthusiasts to sustain the platform?
mitigation: Early beta testing with craft beer community
Partner with local breweries for initial traction

risks.title: Data Quality & Curation
risks.description: Initial beer catalog and location data must be accurate and comprehensive.
mitigation: Manual curation of MVP data by team

risks.title: Brewery Data Sourcing
risks.description: Compiling comprehensive brewery data for Mexico's craft beer scene.
mitigation: Partner with major regional craft breweries upfront
Use existing craft beer resources (Untappd, local guides)
